zh.Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭素可安莫林
zh.Wingham, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特文加姆
zh.Angmering, Sussex, , England: 英國英格蘭素可安莫林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Palmer於1463年1月9日出生在英國素可安莫林時，他的父親Sir John Palmer40歲，母親Isabell Elizabeth Bilton30歲。他於大約1479年與Alice Mariam Clement在英國素可安莫林結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年7月25日在他的家鄉享年87歲。

zh-hans.Angmering, Sussex, , England: 英国英格兰素可安莫林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Palmer于1463年1月9日出生在英国素可安莫林时，他的父亲Sir John Palmer40岁，母亲Isabell Elizabeth Bilton30岁。他于大约1479年与Alice Mariam Clement在英国素可安莫林结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年7月25日在他的家乡享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Palmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English palmer(e) ‘palmer, pilgrim to the Holy Land’ (Anglo-Norman French palmer, Old French pa(l)mer, paum(i)er), so called from the palm branch carried by such pilgrims. The term was also used to denote an itinerant monk who traveled from shrine to shrine under a vow of poverty. This surname is also common in Ireland, where it has been recorded from the 13th century onward.
Irish: when not of English origin (see 1 above), a surname adopted for Gaelic Ó Maolfhoghmhair (see Milford ), the name of an ecclesiastical family.
Swedish (mainly Palmér): ornamental name formed with palm ‘palm tree’ + the suffix -ér (a derivative of Latin -erius) or -er (from German).

variants.name: Milford
meanings: English (mainly Devon): habitational name from any of the many places called Milford, deriving from Old English myln ‘mill’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish (Antrim and Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolfhoghmhair ‘descendant of Maolgfhoghmhair’, a personal name meaning ‘chief of harvest’. The Irish name was first Anglicized as Mullover, which was later assimilated to Milford. See also Palmer .

variants.name: Palmiere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Dante, Enrico, Nicola, Salvatore, Vittorio.

variants.name: Palmore
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Palmer   or an Americanized form of South German   Balmer  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Palmer was born on 9 January 1463, in Angmering, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Palmer, was 40 and his mother, Isabell Elizabeth Bilton, was 30. He married Alice Mariam Clement about 1479, in Angmering, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 25 July 1550, in his hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Palmer est né le 9 janvier 1463, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Palmer, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabell Elizabeth Bilton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Mariam Clement environ 1479, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1550, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Palmer am 9. Januar 1463 in Angmering, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Palmer 40 und seine Mutter Isabell Elizabeth Bilton 30. Er hat um 1479 in Angmering, Sussex, England Alice Mariam Clement geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1550 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Palmer è nato il il 9 gennaio 1463 nel Angmering, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Palmer, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Elizabeth Bilton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Mariam Clement circa 1479, nel Angmering, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 25 luglio 1550, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Palmerが1463年1月9日にイギリススセックスアングメリングで生まれた時，父Sir John Palmerは40歳，母Isabell Elizabeth Biltonは30歳であった。約1479年にイギリススセックスアングメリングでAlice Mariam Clementと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年7月25日に故郷で87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Palmer(이)가 1463년 1월 9일 영국 수세스 앤그머잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Palmer(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Elizabeth Bilton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1479년 영국 수세스 앤그머잉에서 Alice Mariam Clement(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 7월 25일 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 January 1463–25 July 1550: 9 de janeiro de 1463–25 de julho de 1550
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Palmer nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1463, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Palmer, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Elizabeth Bilton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Mariam Clement aproximadamente 1479, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1550, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Palmer родился 9 января 1463 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Palmer было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Elizabeth Bilton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Mariam Clement около 1479 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 25 июля 1550 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.9 January 1463–25 July 1550: 9 de enero de 1463–25 de julio de 1550
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Palmer nació el 9 de enero de 1463, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Palmer, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabell Elizabeth Bilton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alice Mariam Clement aproximadamente 1479, en Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 25 de julio de 1550, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
